steps.t: Melawen can be found in Malbarth in western Lebennin. Barchir has asked you to speak with the people of Malbarth before you depart for the east.
Lendithil can be found in Malbarth in western Lebennin. Barchir has asked you to speak with the people of Malbarth before you depart for the east.
